name: Heatmap
goal: Render a 2D value grid with row + column labels and per-cell color intensity drawn from a 5-color palette.
description: 2D heatmap. Accepts data via two modes (CDR-005): (1) JSON mode — rows/cols/data arrays as JS properties or JSON attributes; (2) slot mode — <ce-heat-row> children each containing <ce-heat-cell> children. Resolution order: data non-empty → JSON mode; else iterate <ce-heat-row> slot children; else empty state. Both modes produce visually identical output for equivalent data. In JSON mode each cell may be a plain number (original API, CDR-008 additive) or a CellInput object { value?, tone?, title? } where tone (1-5) overrides the palette-derived alpha and title becomes the cell tooltip. Palette colors each cell by interpolating the palette token between min and max (auto-detected when max is 0). Cell hover surfaces a focus outline.

props.name: rows
props.description: Row labels (Y axis). Used in JSON mode; ignored in slot mode (labels come from <ce-heat-row label>).

props.name: cols
props.description: Column labels (X axis). Used in both modes; in slot mode falls back to numeric indices when empty.

props.name: data
props.description: Grid values, rows × cols. Each cell is either a plain number (original API preserved per CDR-008) or a CellInput object { value?: number; tone?: 1|2|3|4|5; title?: string }. When tone is set it overrides the palette-derived alpha via the 1-5 ramp. When non-empty, slot children are ignored (CDR-005 resolution order).

props.name: min
props.description: Lower bound of the color scale.

props.name: max
props.description: Upper bound. 0 means auto-detect from data.

props.name: palette
props.description: Color ramp. Applied in both JSON and slot modes.

slots.description: Default slot for <ce-heat-row> children (slot mode per CDR-005). Each row carries a label attr and <ce-heat-cell> children. Non-ce-heat-row elements are passed through to light DOM and ignored by the data-resolution path.
